description:
Characteristics:
Color: black, white
Material: ABS (Acrylonitrile butadiene styrene)
Voltage: 5 V cd, voltage:
Power: 3 W
Tank capacity: 1000 ml
Noise: 36 to 45 db
Spray mist: 50 ml / h
LED light: 7 colors
Area of use: 30 to 40
Working time: about 9 hours (automatic timing)
Size: approx. 10x10x2 2 cm / thickness 66 ''

Characteristics:
-Modern design makes it a great addition to your decor.
-Low power, very good operation, is also an LED night lamp.
-Unique effect with 7 color changes.
-Easy access using the USB cable
- Humidifies the air in the room during summer and winter, refreshes the quality of the air we breathe.
-Purifies the air while spreading your favorite perfume in the room, add 3 to 4 drops of essential oil. (Oil not included)
-It is ideal for your home, office or car.
-Helps provide fresher and cleaner air and a healthy and harmonious living environment.
